response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The lyrics match Ouro Kronii's 'Way 2 U' closely, and the second segment contains talk which was manually transcribed. 2. JSON Usage: Used song references for the first part and fully transcribed the remaining concert talk segment manually, ensuring exact speaker representation. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all lyrics and fast-paced live talking tightly to the vocal triggers to handle sudden interruptions and crowd cheers seamlessly.

subtitles.original: Mmh, hi there, darlings! This is Hololive English -Advent- Devilish Diva...

subtitles.original: ...the one, the only...

subtitles.english: ...Nerissa Ravencroft!

subtitles.original: Roses are red, the fire of my heart is blue...

subtitles.original: ...I am Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame!
subtitles.english: ...I am Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame!

subtitles.english: Lovely to see you, to see you... lovely!

subtitles.original: That was so fun! Yeah!

subtitles.original: I know, we're starting off really strong!
subtitles.english: I know, we're starting off really strong!

subtitles.original: Woah, woah, oh my god!

subtitles.original: And we had Mori...
subtitles.english: And we had Mori...

subtitles.original: ...rocking it out! Seriously!
subtitles.english: ...rocking it out! Seriously!

subtitles.original: And then Kronii coming in with her new song, so good! Yeah, such cute dance moves!
subtitles.english: And then Kronii coming in with her new song, so good! Yeah, such cute dance moves!

subtitles.original: And we had Advent and Justice, of course!

subtitles.original: Yes, yes, did you enjoy?

subtitles.original: Wow, you know what? We didn't have solos yesterday.
subtitles.english: Wow, you know what? We didn't have solos yesterday.

subtitles.original: No, no. So, we must be having them today, right?
subtitles.english: No, no. So, we must be having them today, right?

subtitles.original: So excited!

subtitles.original: Oh, yeah. For mine, I want to practice something, okay? Oh, okay, go on.

subtitles.original: A little chant from Great Exardia. So when I go "Oggy Oggy Oggy", you go "Oi Oi Oi"!

subtitles.original: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: Perfect! Completely... "Compiki"!
subtitles.english: Perfect! Completely... "Compiki"!

subtitles.original: What about you? Any sneak peeks about your solo?

subtitles.original: Mmh... would you guys really like a sneak peek?

subtitles.original: Well... I think I have to remind you all...
subtitles.english: Well... I think I have to remind you all...

subtitles.original: Can I hear it from my wives?!
subtitles.english: Can I hear it from my wives?!
